---
title: "test_uplink_bridge.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/test_uplink_bridge.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.50
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.19
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_uplink.

## Interaction Protocol
Import test_uplink and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `test_uplink`
